name: NEW PEOPLES BANKSHARES INC
summary: New Peoples Bankshares, Inc. is a Virginia financial holding company headquartered in Honaker, Virginia, operating primarily through New Peoples Bank, Inc. The Bank offers commercial loans, residential mortgages, consumer loans, construction loans, deposit accounts, and investment services via New Peoples Financial Services division. It also provides insurance referral services through NPB Insurance Services, Inc. and title insurance through a minority stake in Lonesome Pine Title Agency, LLC. The Bank operates 17 full-service branches across Virginia, West Virginia, North Carolina, and Tennessee.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Loans for working capital, business expansion, equipment purchase for businesses in the market area.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: Fixed and variable rate first and second mortgage loans, construction loans, and home equity lines of credit.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Installment loans for personal, family, and household purposes including home improvement and debt consolidation.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Business and personal checking and savings accounts with 24-hour ATM access and online banking.

products.name: Investment Services
products.description: Fixed and variable annuities, fee-based asset management, and other investment products via New Peoples Financial Services division.

products.name: Insurance Referral Services
products.description: Revenue generated through referral of insurance services via NPB Insurance Services, Inc.

products.name: Title Insurance
products.description: Title insurance services through 39% membership interest in Lonesome Pine Title Agency, LLC.

products.name: Internet Banking
products.description: Online platform for account access, transfers, bill pay, stop payments, check orders, and deposit account opening.

partnerships.description: Broker-dealer relationship enabling New Peoples Financial Services division to offer investment products.
NPB Insurance Services holds 39% membership interest providing title insurance services.
